name: Documentation Improvement
about: Suggest improvements to documentation
title: "[DOCS] "
labels: documentation

---

## Documentation Issue

A clear and concise description of what documentation needs improvement.

## Current Documentation

Quote or link to the current documentation.

## Proposed Improvement

Describe how the documentation could be improved.

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the documentation issue here.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched for existing documentation issues and this is not a duplicate
- [ ] I have clearly described the documentation issue
- [ ] I have proposed a specific improvement
